characters.name: Adam Carter
characters.description: Adam CarterBiographyStatusDeceased (Explosion)OccupationMI5Chief of SectionSenior Case OfficerSeriesFirst"Project Friendly Fire"Last"New Allegiances"Portrayed byRupert Penry-JonesAdam Carterwas a main character in theBBCspy dramaSpooks. He was portrayed byRupert Penry-Jones. Adam was enigmatic and natural performer, and was in his perfect job. After years inMI6; he had confronted his demons and became a ruthless pragmatist. Adam had the power to push himself and his colleagues to the edge and get the job done - then pick up the pieces. This combination of strength and compassion, alongside his absolute belief in the Intelligence Service, made Adam a formidable leader. His MI6 wife,Fiona, was his greatest stimulus. And beneath it all, Adam dreamt of sharing a stable home life with his wife andchild. It wasn't to be: Fiona was shot whiletrying to avenge her previous life in Syria. Adam was enigmatic and natural performer, and was in his perfect job. After years inMI6; he had confronted his demons and became a ruthless pragmatist. Adam had the power to push himself and his colleagues to the edge and get the job done - then pick up the pieces. This combination of strength and compassion, alongside his absolute belief in the Intelligence Service, made Adam a formidable leader. His MI6 wife,Fiona, was his greatest stimulus. And beneath it all, Adam dreamt of sharing a stable home life with his wife andchild. It wasn't to be: Fiona was shot whiletrying to avenge her previous life in Syria. Adamwent into denialat first, but then realized focussing on his work was the best way for him to handle his loss. After discovering thatAl-Qaedahad planted a bomb in a car during Remembrance Sunday, Adam drove the vehicle to some disused land. Just as he stepped out of the car, the bomb exploded, and Adam took the full brunt of its force; killing him.

characters.name: Adem Qasim
characters.description: Adem QasimAdem Qasim(Elyes Gabel) is a main character who appears in the spooks film "Spooks: The Greater Good". He is the primary antagonist of the film, a terrorist who escapesMI5custody thanks to a traitor in MI5's leadership.

characters.name: Adem Qasim
characters.description: Adem QasimAdem Qasim(Elyes Gabel) is a main character who appears in the spooks film "Spooks: The Greater Good". He is the primary antagonist of the film, a terrorist who escapesMI5custody thanks to a traitor in MI5's leadership.

characters.name: Andrea Chambers
characters.description: Andrea ChambersAndrea Chambers(Bronwen Davies) is a young female character who appeared in Spooks's first series episode "Traitor's Gate.

characters.name: Andrew Lawrence
characters.description: Andrew LawrenceBiographyFull NameThe Rt Hon Andrew Lawrence MPStatusDeceased (Explosion)OccupationFormer Home SecretarySeriesFirst"Episode 8.7"Last"Episode 8.8"Portrayed byTobias MenziesThe Rt Hon Andrew Lawrence MPwas the Home Secretary who succeededNicholas Blakewhen he was forced to step down after a political scandal that turned out to be act orchestrated by the secretive Nightingale Group. He first appeared inSeries 8 Episode 7when SirHarry Pearceis informed of an issue concerning a group of Hindu extremists targeting Muslims in Britain. He died at the end ofSeries 8, Episode 8in an explosion alongsideRos Myerswhile she tried to drag them both to safety.

characters.name: Andrew Lawrence
characters.description: Andrew LawrenceBiographyFull NameThe Rt Hon Andrew Lawrence MPStatusDeceased (Explosion)OccupationFormer Home SecretarySeriesFirst"Episode 8.7"Last"Episode 8.8"Portrayed byTobias MenziesThe Rt Hon Andrew Lawrence MPwas the Home Secretary who succeededNicholas Blakewhen he was forced to step down after a political scandal that turned out to be act orchestrated by the secretive Nightingale Group. characters.name: Angela Wells
characters.description: Angela WellsBiographyStatusDeceased (Suicide)OccupationFormer MI5 officerSeriesFirst"Diana"Last"Gas and Oil: Part 1"Portrayed byLindsay DuncanAngela Wellswas a formerMI5field officer, fast tracked to MI5 after a short stint in the home office. She studied modern languages at Newnham College, Cambridge and achieved a double first. At university, she also participated in sports and was a university blue for the 10,000m race, nearly making the 1984 Olympic Games.

characters.name: Angela Wells
characters.description: Angela WellsBiographyStatusDeceased (Suicide)OccupationFormer MI5 officerSeriesFirst"Diana"Last"Gas and Oil: Part 1"Portrayed byLindsay DuncanAngela Wellswas a formerMI5field officer, fast tracked to MI5 after a short stint in the home office. characters.name: Auntie May
characters.description: Auntie MayBiographyStatusDeceased (Murdered)OccupationRunning Isis safe houseSeriesAppearance"Divided They Fall"Portrayed byMargot LeicesterAuntie Mayran the Isis safe house, and posed as the aunt ofAdam Carterwhile he was undercover. She was drowned by thugs from the political party "The British Way", and was found byRuth.

characters.name: Ben Kaplan
characters.description: Ben KaplanBiographyFull NameBen KaplanStatusDeceasedOccupationSection D, Junior Case OfficerSeriesFirstThe DealLastThe MolePortrayed byAlex Lanipekun Ben Kaplanwas an aspiring freelance journalist who was in a relationship withJo Portmanand ultimately got wrapped up inSection D's affairs after sleeping with Jo; having doing so while trying to expose what was going on with MI5 and Section D's activities in stopping terrorism. Shortly after, during a hostage crisis where three important diplomats are held hostage, along with their audience, Ben helpedAdam CarterandRos Myersfree the hostages. Ben was offered a position on the team by Adam, but refused. Later, following the death ofZafar Younis,Harrysuccessfully recruited Ben after discovering he was extremely resourceful and had the making of a good MI5 officer, and so Ben replaced Zaf's place on the team, serving with them in the field on many important operations. When Harry was accused of being aFSBmole who was passing secrets from MI5 regarding "Operation Sugar Horse",Lucas Northwent to Russia to obtain proof of Harry's innocence and expose the real mole, Ben did the same in MI5's paper archive. At the same time, Lucas and Harry found outConnie Jameswas the real mole, Ben found a form in the paper archive proving Connie was the mole, but Connie herself appeared in the archive to assist Ben in finding the form.

characters.name: Beth Bailey
characters.description: Beth BaileyBiographyStatusDecommissionedOccupationJunior Case Officer, Section DSeriesFirstEpisode 9.1LastEpisode 9.8Portrayed bySophia MylesBeth Baileyis a fictional character from the BBC espionage television series Spooks, which follows the exploits ofSection D, a counter-terrorism division inMI5. She is portrayed by British actress Sophia Myles. Beth Bailey was introduced in Spooks' ninth series as a private contractor in her first episode, and later joins Section D. The character is based on a real-life person Myles met while working on the series. The reaction towards the character was generally positive. At age 18, Beth trained withMI6while studying at the University of Edinburgh. She eventually decided she didn't want to work with them and worked as a private contractor. At 22, she worked with a Colombian militant group as a way to anger her father, until she realised what she got herself into and left.

characters.name: Bill Crombie
characters.description: Bill CrombieBill Crombiewas the child hood friend of Harry Pearce who worked with Harry inSection Ain 1978, when Harry had just joinedMI5.

characters.name: Bob Hogan
characters.description: Bob HoganBiographyStatusUnknown (Presumed Dead)OccupationSenior CIA Agent (Later a Freelance Contractor)SeriesFirst"The Virus: Part 1"Last"The School"Portrayed byMatthew MarshBob Hoganis a high rankingCIAagent in Britain working from Grosvenor House, the US embassy. Hogan is an ally or enemy of the team at times, however he normally will work with his counterpartHarry Pearce. Hogan was introduced as an initial enemy after it was revealed he fed false intelligence toSection D. However he has provided reliable intelligence. He is no longer working for the CIA, he trickedAdamandJointo trusting him. He then sold them to a ruthless group known as theRedbacks. The status of Hogan is unknown, but following his arrest by the CIA, it's implied that Hogan has been incarcerated for his betrayal. Following the school attack by Al Qaeda, Hogan becomes part of a deal facilitated by Harry Pearce, which involves the CIA granting MI5 access to Hogan for intelligence, in return for the bombers captured at the school.

characters.name: Calum Reed
characters.description: Calum ReedBiographyFull NameCalum ReedStatusDeceasedOccupationJunior Case Officer (Multi-Role)SeriesFirstEpisode 10.1LastSpooks: The Greater GoodPortrayed byGeoffrey StreatfeildCalum Reedis a Junior Case officer atSection D. He first appeared in Episode 1 of Series 10, replacingBeth Bailey, after she was decommissioned byErin Watts. He is a very talented and able officer, who is extremely cocky. He also thinks of himself as a joker, which sometimes impacts negatively with other people. Calum was killed by terrorists who stormed the grid in Spooks: The Greater Good, afterOliver Mace, Director General, wouldn't open the heavily protected briefing room.

characters.description: Calum ReedBiographyFull NameCalum ReedStatusDeceasedOccupationJunior Case Officer (Multi-Role)SeriesFirstEpisode 10.1LastSpooks: The Greater GoodPortrayed byGeoffrey StreatfeildCalum Reedis a Junior Case officer atSection D. characters.name: Catherine Townsend
characters.description: Catherine TownsendCatherine Townsend(portrayed by Caroline Carver) is he estranged daughter ofHarry Pearcewho chose to go by her motherJane'smaiden name after the divorce. She appears inSeries Three'sepisode "A Prayer for My Daughter.

characters.name: Catherine Townsend
characters.description: Catherine TownsendCatherine Townsend(portrayed by Caroline Carver) is he estranged daughter ofHarry Pearcewho chose to go by her motherJane'smaiden name after the divorce. She appears inSeries Three'sepisode "A Prayer for My Daughter.

characters.name: Charlie Green
characters.description: Charlie GreenBiographyStatusAliveOccupationSpy, MI5SeriesFirstA New AgeLastNational CatastrophePortrayed byLiam BoyleCharlie Greenis a main character inSpooks: Code 9. He is an ex-mathematician who leads the team on an interim basis after the assassination of Hannah in the first episode. He gained the job after he stood up to Field Operations DirectorSarah Yates. Recruited toMI5for his mathematical skills, Charlie is good at puzzle solving, code breaking and probability; not so good with people. The bomb completely changed Charlie’s life. He went from being a young man whose aspirations were to receive a Nobel Prize in mathematics, to becoming an MI5 agent in one swift move.

characters.name: Christine Dale
characters.description: Christine DaleBiographyStatusAliveOccupationEx-CIASeriesFirstThou Shalt Not KillLastProject Friendly FirePortrayed byMegan DoddsChristine Dalewas a familiar face around "The Grid". As theCIAliaison officer, she had regular meetings withTom, which the pair of them generally spent busily trying to pull the wool over one another's eyes. Despite Britain and America's 'special relationship'MI5and CIA seem to have little time for one another. Christine certainly gave little respect to the team. It was a case of opposites attract when a romance blossomed between Christine and Tom. Just like any good security officer, Christine was completely loyal to her country and devoted to her job. She didn't care if she had to trample on a few British people in order to get the job done. When Tom was set up byHerman Joyce, she crumbled. Unable to take the strain any more, Christine quit her job at the CIA

characters.name: Christine Dale

characters.name: Clive McTaggart
characters.description: Clive McTaggartBiographyStatusDeceased (Murdered)OccupationFormer MI5SeriesAppearanceThe BookPortrayed byAndrew BurtClive McTaggartwas a retired high-ranking intelligence officer, who suffered from cancer. He recruitedJuliet Shaw. He wrote his memoirs, and was later murdered, but it was made to look like suicide.Roy Woodringordered the murder, which was witnessed by journalistGary Hicks.

characters.name: Colin Wells
characters.description: Colin WellsBiographyStatusDeceased (Murdered)OccupationMI5 Technician and Data AnalystSeriesFirstLooking After Our OwnLastGas and Oil: Part 1Portrayed byRory MacGregorColin Wellswas the technical wizard ofthe team, also known as "The Geek!". Although he'd have loved to, Colin never had the style and flair ofTomorDanny. However, he was a vital support for the front-line Spooks. He was a master at using all the gadgets and tools of his trade. He could find ways around the most sophisticated of security systems. He took full advantage of the opportunity MI5 gave him to practice with firearms, an extremely uncommon hobby in Britain. Colin was brutally murdered during an attempted terror attack on Britain (specifically byMichael Collingwood's cronies; SIS agentsScott JensenandLee MacKenzie, who caught Colin's attempts to defeat the coup instigated by Collingwood and SirJocelyn Myers, and so hanged him from a tree).

characters.name: Connie James
characters.description: Connie JamesBiographyFull NameConnie JamesStatusDeceased (Explosion)OccupationMI5 Senior AnalystSeriesFirstThe Virus: Part 2LastNuclear StrikePortrayed byGemma Jones Connie Jamesstarted out atMI5when she was 19 as a secretary. In the intervening years she became one of the sharpest, most resourceful, no-nonsense operators in the British Security Services. This is because she knew all the secrets (in the course of her duties as an Intelligence Analyst). When the Ministry of Defence was going to de-commission a nuclear bunker in Surrey containing biological/chemical weapons testing pods; Connie, deciding to retire from MI5, offered herself as housekeeper and lived in the big farmhouse upstairs from the bunker, along with a couple of Labradors, serving as caretaker of the secret bunker. While the bunker remained inactive, it was so top secret only about five people in Britain knew about the bunker. One of them wasHarry Pearce, who visited Connie now needing the pods in order to use them. Connie needed a new life; and so rejoined"The Grid"asRuth Evershed's replacement. Connie was instrumental in assistingthe teamin her technical role and used her skill to resolve situations.

characters.name: Danny Hunter
characters.description: Danny HunterBiographyFull NameDaniel HunterStatusDeceased (Shot)OccupationMI5Junior Case OfficerSeriesFirstThou Shalt Not KillLastThe Suffering of StrangersPortrayed byDavid OyelowoDanny Hunter(1969–2004) is a character appearing in the first three seasons of theBBCtelevision seriesSpooks, known as MI5 in the United States. He is portrayed by British actorDavid Oyelowo. Danny is a Junior Case Officer inSection D, the counter-terrorism department ofMI5. According to the fictional Spooks:Harry's Diary—one of several spin-off books created by Kudos, the series' production company—Hunter joined Section D in June 2000. He was young, sharp and, undoubtedly, was good at his job, but sometimes he was a little over anxious to prove it. He didn't fail to notice the glamour and excitement of being part of MI5, and sometimes it went to his head. He was young, sharp and, undoubtedly, was good at his job, but sometimes he was a little over anxious to prove it. He didn't fail to notice the glamour and excitement of being part of MI5, and sometimes it went to his head. However, no-one could compare to him for his surveillance skills. After getting himself up to his eyeballs in debt, and committed to paying high rents for his luxury flat, Danny losthis flat-mateina catastrophic operation. Luckily for Danny,Zoeagreed to move into the spare bedroom. Despite all of their differences, the two youngSpooksmade a good team, living together (at it makes life a lot easier when you don't have to keep your profession a secret from your flat-mate). Danny's confidence took a serious knock whenTomwas de-commissioned from the Service and Zoe, whom he had deep feelings for, wasforced into hidingwithher boyfriendafter an operation went wrong. Danny then met a sad and untimely end at the hands ofan Iraqi terrorist; who shot him dead.

characters.name: Dimitri Levendis
characters.description: Dimitri LevendisBiographyStatusAliveOccupationSection D, Junior Case OfficerSeriesFirstEpisode 9.1LastEpisode 10.6Portrayed byMax Brown Dimitri Levendiswas born in North London on March 17, 1974 to Greek immigrant parents, and formerly served as a soldier in theSBS, but left in unknown circumstances. He consequently joinedMI5as their Piracy and Terrorism Case Officer. In the first episode of the series, Dimitri is undercover as the captain of a freighter leaving Tangiers and carrying Somali terrorist Hussein Abib (Peter Bankole). Lucas boards the ship to assassinate Abib, but before he is able to complete his mission, the ship is hijacked by Abib and his men. Dimitri discovers that the terrorists have loaded the ship with explosives, apparently with the intention of sailing into Plymouth where an aircraft carrier is about to be launched. Lucas encounters private contractor Beth Bailey, masquerading as an Eastern European prostitute, and the two escape. Dimitri and his crew are held hostage by Abib, who executes one of them for failing to change the ships course. Dimitri and his surviving crew member are moved to a storage container, were he tells the man that he is an MI5 agent. While there, they hear two boats go overboard, later discovered to be submersibles laden with explosives meant to explode the Thames. After escaping from the storage container, Dimitri kills Abib and makes it back to Britain.

characters.name: Dimitri Levendis
characters.description: Dimitri LevendisBiographyStatusAliveOccupationSection D, Junior Case OfficerSeriesFirstEpisode 9.1LastEpisode 10.6Portrayed byMax Brown Dimitri Levendiswas born in North London on March 17, 1974 to Greek immigrant parents, and formerly served as a soldier in theSBS, but left in unknown circumstances. He consequently joinedMI5as their Piracy and Terrorism Case Officer. In the first episode of the series, Dimitri is undercover as the captain of a freighter leaving Tangiers and carrying Somali terrorist Hussein Abib (Peter Bankole). Lucas boards the ship to assassinate Abib, but before he is able to complete his mission, the ship is hijacked by Abib and his men. Dimitri discovers that the terrorists have loaded the ship with explosives, apparently with the intention of sailing into Plymouth where an aircraft carrier is about to be launched. Lucas encounters private contractor Beth Bailey, masquerading as an Eastern European prostitute, and the two escape. Dimitri and his crew are held hostage by Abib, who executes one of them for failing to change the ships course. Dimitri and his surviving crew member are moved to a storage container, were he tells the man that he is an MI5 agent. While there, they hear two boats go overboard, later discovered to be submersibles laden with explosives meant to explode the Thames. After escaping from the storage container, Dimitri kills Abib and makes it back to Britain.

characters.name: Elena Gavrik
characters.description: Elena GavrikBiographyStatusDeceased (Strangled)OccupationCold War AssetSeriesFirstEpisode 10.1LastEpisode 10.6Portrayed byAlice KrigeElena Gavrikis the wife of Russian State MinisterIlya Gavrik. She was alsoHarry Pearce's asset during the Cold War. In order to turn her, Harry seduced her and they became lovers. She leads Harry to believe that he is the father of her son,Sasha Gavrikbut in the final episode it is revealed that she lied. During the time Harry ran her in the 1980s, she was already working for the KGB, and in fact recruited Harry without him knowing it by making him fall in love with her, and by falsely claiming that Sasha was his son. She is working against the Russian-British partnership agreement by planning attacks that will send the two countries to war with each other. When Ilya finds out he confronts his wife, strangling her to death.

characters.name: Elizabeta Starkova
characters.description: Elizabeta StarkovaBiographyFull NameElizabeta StarkovaStatusDivorcedGenderFemaleRomancesLucas North(ex-husband)Elizabeta Starkovais the ex-wife ofLucas North.

characters.name: Ellie Simm
characters.description: Ellie SimmEllie Simm(Esther Hall) is a restaurant chef, who starts datingTom Quinnat the beginning of Spook's first series.Ellie is a single mother of her daughter Maisie, 8, after being abandoned by the father. Tom first meets Ellie whilst he is working undercover as Matthew Artcher (a civil servant working in IT) and subsequently forced to date Ellie under this identity, leaving Ellie unaware of her boyfriends real name and that he is an MI5 agent. Ellie doesn't find out about Tom's real identity untilTraitor's Gate, when Tom is forced to take time off work due to being shot in theprevious episode. When Ellie sees Tom's bullet wound, she demands the truth from him, feeling disappointed and betrayed when she finds out she has been lied to, but begins to accept his career and agrees to continue their relationship.

characters.name: Ellie Simm
characters.description: Ellie SimmEllie Simm(Esther Hall) is a restaurant chef, who starts datingTom Quinnat the beginning of Spook's first series.Ellie is a single mother of her daughter Maisie, 8, after being abandoned by the father. characters.name: Erin Watts
characters.description: Erin WattsBiographyFull NameErin WattsStatusDeceased (shot by Harry Pearce)OccupationSection ChiefSeriesFirstEpisode 10.1LastSpooks: The Greater GoodPortrayed byLara PulverErin Wattsis the current Section Chief ofSection D, taking over fromLucas Northbetween Series 9 and 10. Erin is on a meteoric rise to the top. But despite that, she’s not a careerist. She’s just interested in doing the job to the best of her ability. Erin is a great leader, scrupulously fair, intellectually brilliant and brave – hurling herself into physical danger without a second thought. So what fuels Erin’s fire? Erin is driven by an unshakeable belief that is challenged every day by what she sees around her; she believes you can live a normal, happy life and be a Spook. Erin was made acting head of the counter-terrorism division in MI5 while Harry was on forced leave following the Albany incident and the death of Section Chief Lucas North. Erin made a mark in Section D by decommissioning Beth Bailey due to her rather sinister past and her actions during the Westhouse operation. She later told Harry that she expected higher standards than that. She was also the one who hired Calum Reed into Section D.

characters.name: Fiona Carter
characters.description: Fiona CarterBiographyFull NameFiona CarterStatusDeceased (Shot)OccupationMI5Junior Case OfficerSeriesFirst"A Prayer for My Daughter"Last"Syria"Portrayed byOlga SosnovskaFiona Carterwas one ofMI6's most respected officers. She constantly enjoyed shifting identities and even the lies. This chameleon quality was deeply attractive to her husbandAdam, but unlike him, she shied away from introspective questioning, knowing her best work was her skill in the field. Fiona was intensely loyal both to her family and workmates but struggled with the conflict of motherhood and espionage. Though she loved her sonWes, she would never leave the world of the Spooks willingly. Fiona originally worked at MI6, but was seconded to MI5 followingZoe Reynolds' departure. This would allow Fiona to work alongside Adam as part ofSection D. Fiona had previously been married toFarook Sukkareigh, a Syrian spy. This past life caused her ultimate downfall, as, while she was working undercover, Farook (whom she thought was dead), now a terrorist, tracked her down and, upon finding she had re-married to Adam, kidnaps her and attempts to smuggle her back to Syria. While Fiona is able to escape, Farook, before he is killed by Adam, shoots and kills Fiona. Fiona dies in Adam's arms.

characters.name: Gary Hicks
characters.description: Gary HicksBiographyOccupationJournalistSeriesFirstThe BookLastThe BookPortrayed byDouglas HodgeGary Hicksis a journalist at a tabloid newspaper, and friend ofRuth Evershed. He witnessed the murder ofClive McTaggart.

characters.name: Geraldine Maltby
characters.description: Geraldine MaltbyBiographyStatusDeceased (poisoned)GenderFemaleOccupationDeputy Director General of MI5SeriesAppearanceSpooks: The Greater GoodPortrayed byJennifer EhleGeraldine Maltby(Jennifer Ehle) is the Deputy Director-General ofMI5. She is shown to be a traitor inSpooks: The Greater Good, as she allows a known terrorist to escape by blocking all MI5 requests for air assistance from the Metropolitan police. Her treachery is discovered byHarry Pearce, who then kills her using a pill labelled as ‘A way out’ which Maltby had attempted to coerce Harry into committing suicide with earlier in the film.

characters.name: Geraldine Maltby
characters.description: Geraldine MaltbyBiographyStatusDeceased (poisoned)GenderFemaleOccupationDeputy Director General of MI5SeriesAppearanceSpooks: The Greater GoodPortrayed byJennifer EhleGeraldine Maltby(Jennifer Ehle) is the Deputy Director-General ofMI5. characters.name: Gerry Houghton
characters.description: Gerry HoughtonBiographyFull NameGerry HoughtonStatusDeceased (Shot)OccupationMPSeriesAppearanceGas and Oil: Part 1Portrayed byRoger RingroseGerry Houghtonwas a MP and the godfather of the Prime Minister's sonRowan. He was shot to death, as he was felt to be impeding the progression of the coup as a ‘voice of reason’ in the cabinet inGas and Oil (part 1) His death was ordered byJocelyn Myers,Paul Millington,Michael Collingwood, and the Cabinet Secretary, Alan Taylor

characters.name: Hampton Wilder
characters.description: Hampton WilderBiographyFull NameHampton WilderSeriesEpisodes1Appearance"The Rose Bed Memoirs"Hampton Wilderis a British male who appears in "The Rose Bed Memoirs". He is a ex-MP that is released from prison, having served a sentence for embezzlement.

characters.name: Hannah
characters.description: HannahSeriesFirst"A New Age"Hannahis a character fromSpooks: Code 9who is shot in the first episode.

characters.name: Hannah Santo
characters.description: Hannah SantoSeriesAppearance"Spooks: The Greater Good"Portrayed byEleanor MatsuuraHannah Santo(Eleanor Matsuura) is a British female who is working as aMI5officer during the events of "Spooks: The Greater Good". Hannah is seen only in the film and not the Television series and so either joined MI5 sometime after the series ended or worked in some other area of the organisation. . We first see her when she picks upWill Hollowayfrom Moscow and takes him back to meet with a group of senior intelligence figures; MI5 Director GeneralOliver Mace, JIC Chairman Francis Warrender (David Harewood), MI5 Head of Counter-Intelligence Emerson (Elliot Levey) and MI5 Deputy Director General Geraldine Maltby (Jennifer Ehle).
